stories.title: Catalog data table component
stories.notes: CatalogTable with checkbox, sortable headers, pagination 20/page, StatusBadge inline.

stories.title: Catalog filter bar
stories.notes: Category/Supplier/Status/Location dropdowns + text search. Mobile sheet collapse.

stories.title: Catalog column sorting
stories.notes: Click cycles asc→desc→unsorted. Arrow icons. Resets pagination.

stories.title: Create item form — side sheet
stories.notes: ItemFormSheet with zod validation, organized sections, SKU uniqueness check.

stories.title: Edit item via form sheet
stories.notes: Pre-populated edit mode, PermissionGate on edit buttons.

stories.title: New Item button and page header
stories.notes: Header with count, New Item button (desktop), FAB (mobile), PermissionGate.

stories.title: Catalog page composition
stories.notes: Full page with filter→sort→paginate pipeline, create/edit/delete flows.
